stages.name: Search & discover
stages.description: Trigger event hits — storm, tripping breaker, EV delivery date, 8pm outage, GC handoff, tenant complaint. Persona goes to Google, AI platform, or peer recommendation channel (Nextdoor, Houzz, LinkedIn).

stages.name: Evaluate & compare
stages.description: Residential personas pull up 2-3 options on mobile, scan reviews, check BBB rating, look for licensure/insurance badges. Cynthia decides in under 5 minutes. Heather & Mark / Daniel take 1-3 weeks. Michael trusts GC referral but cross-checks via Houzz. Carla takes 90+ days.

stages.name: Validate & decide
stages.description: Cross-references on Nextdoor, Facebook groups, YouTube/TikTok creator content, project portfolio reviews, commercial references. AI platforms increasingly used for second-opinion check.

decisionDrivers.title: Speed of response — right now, near me
decisionDrivers.description: Single biggest factor for emergency motion. Cynthia decides in under 5 minutes. Whichever brand answers the phone, returns the form-fill within 15 minutes, and confirms same-day/next-day visit wins. Tap-to-call mobile + LSA pack presence are required to convert urgency.

decisionDrivers.title: Trust signals — license, insurance, longevity, reviews
decisionDrivers.description: Daniel reads 3+ reviews and checks BBB. Heather & Mark want Google Guaranteed + 4.7★+ + 10+ years operating. Carla requires current COI and 2-3 commercial references. Kirchner's 4.9★ / 237 reviews / 40 years is one of the strongest in the category but only if it surfaces.

decisionDrivers.title: Transparent pricing and no surprise upsells
decisionDrivers.description: Daniel hates being sold a panel he doesn't need. Vanessa wants flat-rate Tesla Wall Connector pricing online before calling. Heather & Mark fear hidden install fees on a $12K generator quote. Service-page price ranges, flat-rate diagnostics, and written quotes convert materially higher than 'call for a quote.'

decisionDrivers.title: Specialization signals for the high-stakes job
decisionDrivers.description: Generator install, FPE Stab-Lok replacement, Tesla/EV certification, pool/addition coordination, commercial COI + multi-property capacity. The generalist 'we do all electrical work' positioning loses every one of these to a brand with a dedicated service page, manufacturer-certification badge, or commercial-track sub-site.

decisionDrivers.title: Local roots and neighbor recommendations
decisionDrivers.description: Heather & Mark, Daniel, Michael all use Nextdoor and Cypress Facebook groups as primary trust validators. The 40-year operating history is a structural advantage no franchise (Mister Sparky) and no aggregator (Abacus, JMS) can match — but it has to surface.

decisionDrivers.title: Mobile-first booking and speed-of-quote
decisionDrivers.description: Vanessa books from her phone without calling. Cynthia taps the LSA pack and dials the first result. Daniel form-fills at midnight and expects response by 9am. Sticky tap-to-call, 60-second quote form, and 15-minute response SLA convert significantly better than 'please complete the contact form' on a slow-loading page. Kirchner mobile experience (20.6s LCP, no sticky CTA) is the bottleneck.
